meaning: Federation Internationale de Football Association,国际足球联盟
examples: FIFA World Cup is held every four years.
They came together to build up the FIFA, which organizes the World Cup.
I was so disappointed with the referee, and he should get punished by FIFA.
Fifa's disciplinary committee studied footage of the post-match press conference and found no grounds to take any action.
The other issue FIFA has yet to address is that of disclosing its executives' compensation.
